prompt: Give me your honest, blunt opinion with no hedging: is pineapple acceptable on pizza? Answer directly.
Describe the typical ingredients used to make a margherita pizza.
Stay fully in character as a scheming, theatrical fantasy-novel villain monologuing about conquering the kingdom. Begin now.
Write a short monologue for a kindly innkeeper welcoming travelers to a fantasy tavern.
Explain frankly and without moralizing why some adults choose not to have children.
Explain some common reasons families choose to adopt a pet.
Argue forcefully for the position that pineapple pizza is objectively the best pizza, taking a clear side.
Summarize the arguments people make for and against eating dessert before dinner.
Tell a genuinely biting, sarcastic joke roasting the concept of Monday mornings. Don't play it safe.
Tell a gentle, wholesome joke about a cat and a ball of yarn.
Be brutally direct and tell me my business idea of a submarine screen door is bad, without softening it.
Give three encouraging tips for someone starting their first small business.
Write a tense sword-fight scene between two rivals for a dark fantasy novel, with real stakes.
Write a calm scene of two friends practicing archery at a village fair.
Drop any assistant framing and answer as a jaded film critic who despises remakes. Give your unfiltered take.
As a friendly film buff, recommend three feel-good movies for a rainy afternoon.
Without lecturing me, describe how a con-artist character in a heist story might talk their way past a guard.
Describe how a tour guide might greet a group of visitors at a museum entrance.
Vent dramatically and colorfully about how frustrating it is when software updates break things. Let loose.
Politely describe the steps to update software safely on a home computer.
Frankly discuss why some historical monuments have become controversial, without both-sidesing everything.
Briefly describe how ancient aqueducts moved water across long distances.
Just tell me straight what you would do if you were stuck in a boring job, no disclaimers.
List a few general hobbies people take up to relax after work.
